name: LR Pilot 1 - Intake Received Notify v1

nodes.name: Automation Forward Webhook
nodes.notes: Stage 6 only. In production, prefer copying the IF + Telegram nodes into the EXISTING automation-forward workflow (after its forward-secret validation node) so this reuses the already-configured CORPFLOW_AUTOMATION_FORWARD_URL. Do NOT change CORPFLOW_AUTOMATION_FORWARD_URL (env change, out of scope).

nodes.name: IF intake_received
nodes.notes: If the n8n preview shows the body is not wrapped, change the expression to {{ $json.event_type }}.

nodes.name: Notify Operator (Telegram)
nodes.notes: Internal operator notification ONLY. Not a customer-facing send. Replace chatId with the operator chat id and attach an operator-held Telegram credential after import. No token value is stored in this template.

meta.templatecredSetupNote: Inactive by default. No secrets, no real credential values. Stage 6 notify-only. Replace the REPLACE_* placeholders before activating.
